title: galium parisiense subsp. anglicum
intro: Galium parisiense subsp. anglicum, also known as English Cleaver, is a perennial plant species within the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and astringent qualities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Galium parisiense subsp. anglicum include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Galium parisiense subsp. anglicum can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
